_comment: CURATED EXPERT KNOWLEDGE — not derivable from stats. 'note' is the one-line identity shown on the sticky note; 'wants'/'avoids'/'mistake' feed the Champion Identity section. Keep every line something a Diamond player would actually say.

Ezreal.note: Poke-and-scale ADC — win with health advantage, not kills.
Ezreal.wants: Long trades from max range where his skillshots hit and yours can't be answered.
Ezreal.avoids: All-ins and hard commits — he has no reset and dies if he stays in melee.
Ezreal.mistake: Greeding Q for damage instead of using it to farm safely from behind the wall.

Karma.note: Poke + disengage enchanter — she makes their engage cost them the fight.
Karma.wants: To shield the carry through engage and RQ-poke a target below fighting HP first.
Karma.avoids: Blowing her shield/speed early as poke — that tool is what saves the fight later.
Karma.mistake: Using the shield proactively when it should be held for the moment they commit.

Orianna.note: Scaling control mage — the delayed payoff behind your engage.
Orianna.wants: To have her ball on the frontline tank so her ult lands on the whole enemy team.
Orianna.avoids: Getting jumped without her ball nearby — no ball means no defense and no wombo.
Orianna.mistake: Ulting for a single kill instead of saving it to answer or start the 5v5.

Ornn.note: Scaling engage tank who upgrades the whole team's items.
Ornn.wants: To pick the fight with his ram+ult so his carries follow up from safety.
Ornn.avoids: Facechecking as the lone frontline before his team can follow his engage.
Ornn.mistake: Engaging when his own team isn't there to convert the knockup into a kill.

Sejuani.note: Tempo tank jungler — her ult is the team's 'go' button.
Sejuani.wants: To land Glacial Prison on a priority target so the wombo team follows up.
Sejuani.avoids: Solo-ganking for a kill she doesn't need — her value is the teamfight engage.
Sejuani.mistake: Wasting her ult on the frontline tank instead of a carry.

Caitlyn.note: Longest-range lane bully — she wins by turning range into plates.
Caitlyn.wants: To zone with 650 range and traps, deny CS, and take tower plates early.
Caitlyn.avoids: Fair fights at even range — she has no escape if you close the gap on her.
Caitlyn.mistake: Overstaying to force a kill when she'd already won by taking the tower.

Blitzcrank.note: One hook is the whole game — when it's down, he is harmless.
Blitzcrank.wants: To land a single hook and instantly delete whoever it catches.
Blitzcrank.avoids: Missing the hook — his entire threat is on that one cooldown.
Blitzcrank.mistake: Throwing hooks into minions or tanks instead of waiting for a real target.

Renekton.note: Early lane tyrant on a timer — snowball now or fall off.
Renekton.wants: To bully the early levels, get a lead, and use it before ~25 minutes.
Renekton.avoids: A long, even game — his damage evaporates once carries get items.
Renekton.mistake: Farming passively and 'scaling' — that throws away his only strong window.

LeeSin.note: Early skirmish jungler — impact now or become a worse version of everyone.
LeeSin.wants: To gank and invade early and convert kills into a snowball for his lanes.
LeeSin.avoids: Farming to late game — he has no scaling and falls off a cliff.
LeeSin.mistake: Doing flashy mechanics for a solo kill instead of taking the objective it enabled.

LeBlanc.note: Roaming burst assassin — she deletes one squishy and leaves.
LeBlanc.wants: To roam with tempo and one-shot an isolated carry, then vanish.
LeBlanc.avoids: Extended fights — she gets one combo, and if it fails she's useless and squishy.
LeBlanc.mistake: Committing both dashes to a target she can't kill, then dying with no escape.

Jinx.note: Immobile hypercarry — protect her and she wins the game by herself.
Jinx.wants: To sit at max range behind peel and reset off a kill to take over the fight.
Jinx.avoids: Being caught out or dived — she has zero mobility and dies instantly if reached.
Jinx.mistake: Walking up for a greedy rocket and getting picked before the fight starts.

Lulu.note: Hard-peel enchanter — she keeps one carry alive through everything.
Lulu.wants: To babysit the hypercarry and polymorph/ult whoever dives them.
Lulu.avoids: Wandering off her carry — apart from them she does almost nothing.
Lulu.mistake: Using her ult as poke/heal early instead of saving it to deny a kill.

Malphite.note: Point-and-click wombo engage — one ult can end the game.
Malphite.wants: To buy armor, survive the early game, and flash-ult onto two or more carries.
Malphite.avoids: Blowing his ult on one target — his whole game is the multi-man engage.
Malphite.mistake: Engaging when his team can't follow, turning a game-ender into a solo death.

Yasuo.note: Knockup-hungry carry — he needs your CC to unlock his ult.
Yasuo.wants: Allied knockups (Malphite, Sejuani, Ornn) to chain his ult off of.
Yasuo.avoids: Poke-and-disengage lanes that punish his walk-up before he has items.
Yasuo.mistake: Ulting for the first knockup he sees instead of the teamfight one.

Warwick.note: Early-game hunter — strongest when a lane can lock a target for his fear.
Warwick.wants: Lanes with reliable CC; a setup for his fear is worth more than raw damage.
Warwick.avoids: Just farming — he's an early bully and wastes that edge by playing for late.
Warwick.mistake: Ganking lanes with no CC, so targets simply walk away from his sustain.

Viego.note: Reset-hunter jungler — he is the follow-up, not the initiator.
Viego.wants: Someone else (Nautilus, Ornn, Leona) to open the fight so he can get a reset.
Viego.avoids: Starting fights himself — he needs a target already committed to reset off a kill.
Viego.mistake: Trying to be the engage when his kit is built to clean up after one.

Nami.note: Tempo enchanter — her Bubble is a defensive tool, not a poke tool.
Nami.wants: To hold Bubble to punish the enemy's engage, and empower her ADC's trades.
Nami.avoids: Wasting Bubble as random poke — then she has no answer when they commit.
Nami.mistake: Throwing Bubble to chip HP, leaving her ADC defenseless into engage supports.

Leona.note: All-in engage support — she wins by forcing your cooldowns then committing.
Leona.wants: You to waste your defensive spell early so her E all-in finds no answer.
Leona.avoids: A support who saves peel for her engage — then every all-in of hers fails.
Leona.mistake: (For you to punish) — she has no poke, so if she can't all-in she does nothing.
